Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0x217E "AlternativeFormats\PRGs\Uncrunched\Demons of Dex (Digital Monastery - 2016).prg,0x0400,0x00EC" -Di_irq_exit=0 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 lda #$35 sta $01 jsr $8100 lda #$35 sta $01 jsr $8000 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Demons of Dex (Digital Monastery - 2016).prg"
Metadata.Notes:
Added a routine at $8000 which:
1. Turns off interrupts from the two CIA chips and acks any pending CIA interrupts 2. Sets up the correct VICII settings to display the loading screen 3. Sets the coordinates for the press space sprite 4. Initialises the loading music by calling the routine at $1000
